import pytest
from source import gcd


def test_gcd_reduces_correctly_when_remainder_nonzero():
    # Bug: gcd(35, 21) -> gcd(14, 21) -> gcd(14, 21) -> ... (RecursionError)
    # Fix: gcd(35, 21) -> gcd(21, 14) -> gcd(14, 7) -> gcd(7, 0) -> 7
    result = gcd(35, 21)
    assert result == 7, f"gcd(35, 21) should be 7, got {result}"
